questions.q: Bert: Excuse me, could you please show me the way to the cable car station? The Passer-by: It’s that way. Bert: I’m sorry, but I’m a man without any sense of direction. And I’m new in town. So I’m afraid The Passer-by: Well, it’s actually kind of complicated, and my English isn’t so good...Let me draw you a map! Bert: Sure! That will do. Thanks a lot!
options: it’s not your business to judge me.
you need to be a bit more specific.
it depends on how you want to get there.

you have to take me there personally. III. 綜合測驗 說明:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 21 至 30 題,每題有四個選項,請依各篇短文文意, 選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 21-25 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 Nowadays almost everyone has heard of the term “podcast” but may not be so familiar with its history. First, it is a term 21 by a British journalist, Ben Hammersley, in 2004. (Actually, he coined this word by putting together the two words, “iPod” and “broadcast.”) And it began with several IT engineers’ simple attempt to adapt word and audio files to the Internet format. Today no one will have any doubt about its 22, since it has become so popular, especially with young people. If you ask podcast fans what’s so wonderful about it, they’ll probably say, “ 23 its contents and convenience 23 attract me!” Indeed, the audiences of podcast are offered a wide range of choices; 24, they can choose to download any program they like at any time they want. Besides, there have been more and more podcast channels 25 students can learn English as well as many other languages. So perhaps one day, podcasting will be included in our language education.
questions.explanation: 小柏:請問一下,能否告訴我去纜車站的路? 員,職業母親的 (27) 工作效率其實要高得多。也就是說, 路人甲:就在那個方向。 雖然職業母親 (28) 兼顧工作與家庭,但不知如何似乎卻有 小柏:不好意思,但是我這個人就是沒有方向感,而 更高的生產力。 且我初到貴寶地,所以恐怕 該研究團隊指出,主要原因或許在於職業母親同時 路人甲:事實上,這個有些複雜,而且我的英文也沒 上班並且擔任家長, (29) 使她們得以一心多用。也就是 那麼好...我畫張地圖給你好了! 說,即使數件工作擺在面前,她們仍然可以 (30) 專注於每 小柏:當然!這樣也行。太感恩了! 一項工作,並且都漂亮完成。這或許就是她們能在工作 112-4 共同科目 英文 詳解 上展現出高生產力的祕訣。 條件:年滿 20 歲,高中學歷,具備基本電腦操作技能。

questions.q: Which of the following about the website JobMatch is true?
options: It is run by a government-supported organization that helps people find work.
It targets employers and jobseekers, connecting them with each other.

Val, a 17-year-old Taiwanese student, has just registered on JobMatch.
questions.explanation: 關於「找工作媒」這個網站,下列何者為真? 的一則工作廣告。然後一間叫做「噗嚨共」的公司 (A) 該網站由一個政府支持的組織所經營,該組織主 面試我。昨天他們用電郵通知我已經錄取了!我好 要幫助民眾找工作。 興奮啊! (B) 該網站目標鎖定雇主與求職人士, 替這兩者牽線。 (C) 阿珠與阿花兩位是美國公民,她們可以在「找工 太棒了,小妮子!趕快告訴我妳即將服務的這間公 作媒」上找到工作。 司,以及妳的新工作! (D) 小薇今年 17 歲,是一名臺灣的高中生,她剛剛在 這是一間位於柬埔寨的法資公司。我去他們的網站 「找工作媒」上註冊。 看過,看起來沒問題。但似乎沒人聽說過這間公司。

questions.q: When you vouch for something, you.
options: promise that it’s good or true
guess that it’s lousy or false

questions.explanation: 當你替某件事背書,你 。 這點有些奇怪。而且他們在線上面試中告訴我, 「務 (A) 保證這件事是好的或真實的 必」要把護照與銀行存摺交給他們,而且他們要我 (B) 猜想這件事是糟糕的或子虛烏有的 馬上飛去柬埔寨。我不介意住在柬埔寨,因為我曾 (C) 找出替這件事負責的人 經在那裡生活過幾個月。他們也要我和他們簽約, (D) 將這件事從頭至尾弄明白 合約內容卻是用柬埔寨文寫的。這一點也有些怪 Question 33-35 異。對了,順便一提,他們從沒有告知我工作的內 小妮子今年 22 歲,大學時主修電腦科技,上星期才 容。我猜我應該是做一些電腦方面的工作。對我來 剛剛畢業。有天她在「找工作媒」網站上偶然發現這則 說這根本是小菜一碟,因為你知道我的電腦能力有 求職廣告,她對這份工作相當感興趣... 多棒。你真該看看他們給我的薪水與福利。簡直 「棒 徵求 呆了」!所以老爸,你認為呢?這不就是我的「夢 辦公室員工一名,工作地點為本公司在柬埔寨的工廠。 幻工作」嗎? 112-4 共同科目 英文 詳解 寶貝,讓我先搞清楚:你要大老遠飛去柬埔寨,去 (B) 求職詐騙:問題已經解決 一間沒人知道底細的公司上班,做一份妳不確定職 (C) 如何舉報求職詐騙? 務的工作。而且還要簽一份妳看不懂內容的合約。 (D) 如何能辨別求職詐騙? 這樣有道理嗎?妳有沒有想過為何他們的面試是採

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Which of the following about this job ad is true?
options: Prolonger wants someone who can speak the Cambodian language well enough.
Prolonger pays whoever gets hired $3000 to fly between Taiwan and Cambodia.
The person Prolonger hires must use Cambodian computers to design metal products.
The person Prolonger hires will work with 500 workers at its factory in Cambodia.

options: what kinds of products Prolonger makes in Cambodia
how many factories Prolonger has in Cambodia
the content of the office clerk’s work
the way the office clerk is interviewed
questions.explanation: 依據這則徵才廣告,關於「噗嚨共」的工作職缺,下 Question 31-32 列何者是我們所不知道的? 找工作媒 (A) 「噗嚨共」在柬埔寨所生產的產品 正如其名,這裡是一個獨立、私營的網站,旨在 (B) 「噗嚨共」在柬埔寨有多少間的工廠 媒合雇主與求職人士。也就是說,我們提供一個平臺, (C) 辦公室職員的工作內容 讓求職人士能找到理想工作,雇主也能請到理想員 (D) 辦公室職員的面試方式 工。請點選此處免費註冊,之後再張貼求職廣告或寄

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: According to the job ad, why do you think Nikki is interested in the job Prolonger is offering?
options: She has good financial records.
She enjoys life in Cambodia.
She wants a much higher pay.

She meets all the requirements. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 36-37 題 Hi, Dad. You know what? I answered a job ad on JobMatch. Then a company called Prolonger interviewed me online. Yesterday they told me by e-mail that I got the job! I’m so excited! That’s wonderful, Nikki! Tell me about the company you’ll work for, and your new job, too! Well, it’s a French-based company in Cambodia. I checked out its website. It looks fine. But it seems that no one has ever heard of it. It’s kind of strange. And they told me in the online interview that I MUST give them my passport and bank account book, and that they wanted me to fly to Cambodia right away! I don’t mind living in Cambodia, for I used to spend several months there. They also wanted me to sign a contract written in the Cambodian language. It’s also a bit odd. Oh, by the way, they’ve never told me what I have to do there. I guess I’ll do some computer work. It’s no problem for me because you know how good I am with the computer. And you should see the wage and benefits they give me. They are AMAZING! So what do you think, Dad? Isn’t it a DREAM JOB for me?
questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Why does Nikki think it is a dream job for her?
options: Prolonger wants neither her passport nor her bank account book.
It’s in Cambodia, a country she knows, and it is French-based.
Prolonger is a new French company that was just started.
It might be what she is good at, and it sounds so fantastic.
questions.explanation: 為何小妮子認為這是她的夢幻工作? (B) 美國與英國政府一起攜手打擊求職詐騙。 (A) 「噗嚨共」既不要她的護照,也不要她的銀行存 (C) 求職者若是想要工作想瘋了,或許便無法辨認出 摺。 假的求職廣告。 (B) 這間公司位於柬埔寨,她熟知的國家,而且這是 (D) 人口販賣交易中的受害者,和求職詐騙中的受害 間法資公司。 者,是不同的兩批人。 (C) 「噗嚨共」是間剛成立的公司。

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Which of the following is NOT the reason why Nikki should call 165?
options: It is very likely that Prolonger is a fake company.
Nikki’s bank account book is no good for Prolonger.
They won’t let Nikki know about her job or contract.

They insisted on giving Nikki an online interview. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 38-42 題 Recently the word “job scam” has already become one of the most googled keywords across the globe. It seems that people everywhere in the world are quite eager to find out whatever they can about this illegal activity. The main reason may be that the Internet nowadays has become rife with various kinds of job scams. Additionally, experts have observed that job scams have been commonly seen on the Internet since the COVID-19 pandemic. For instance, from 2020 to 2021 job scams reported to the U.S. government almost tripled. Similarly in the U.K., job scams in 2020 increased by 88%, compared with 2019. One possible explanation, according to experts, is that as the COVID-19 crisis has made it more difficult to find a decent job, lots of people simply jump at whatever job opportunities they can find, without making sure whether or not they are real. Besides, the way job scammers operate is almost the same around the world: first, they create a fake job ad that usually looks legitimate. When a jobseeker falls for it, the so-called company will attempt to steal his or her personal and financial information. After they manage to do so, they may go further, cheating a great deal of money out of the jobseeker in a number of clever ways (e.g., they may ask him or her to pay a fortune for some expensive goods and try to resell them to their fake client that doesn’t exist at all!) Moreover, if it is the worst kind of job scam, the jobseeker may be kidnapped and end up as a victim in the notorious human-trafficking business! Some may wonder if it is possible that all the nations on earth might work together to fight job scam crimes, now that they are being committed worldwide. Well, let’s just say that some joint effort has been made. For example, the EU set up the European Anti-Fraud Office in 1999, aiming to investigate Europe’s fraudulent activities, including job scams. But when it comes to a well-coordinated, cross-continental campaign against job scams, there’s still so much that remains to be done!
questions.explanation: 下列何者不是小妮子該打 165 的原因? (A) 塞滿了該事物 (B) 與該事物很搭調 (A) 「噗嚨共」有可能是一間假公司。 (C) 和該事物完全相反 (D) 成為該事物 (B) 小妮子的銀行存摺對他們毫無用處。

questions.q: According to the essay, which of the following is true?
options: People googled “job scams” because they were rare.
The COVID-19 pandemic helped spread job scams.
How job scammers work may vary from place to place.
Job scammers want nothing but their victims’ money.
questions.explanation: 正解：(B)；來源：112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.unit: 112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: According to the essay, we can know that
options: the poorer a country is, the more often its people will google “job scams.”
the U.S. and the U.K. governments had worked together to fight job scams.
a jobseeker may not identify fake job ads because (s)he wants a job too badly.
victims in the human-trafficking business are different from those in job scams.
questions.explanation: 根據本篇短文,我們可以得知 沒錯,寶貝。我想妳是碰上了求職詐騙。馬上打 165, (A) 一個國家越窮,其人民就越會用谷歌查詢「求職 告訴他們事情經過! 詐騙」 。

options: is full of
goes with
is opposite to
turns into

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 112-4-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: What is the author’s point in the last paragraph?
options: While there have been more and more job scam crimes on our planet, each nation still prefers to think of it as a minor issue.
Even if all the nations on earth could work together to fight job scams, it still wouldn’t make any difference at all.
Speaking of the spread of job scams in the world, our top priority should be to find out where they really come from.

When it comes to international cooperation to solve the problem of job scam crimes, there’s still room for improvement. 二、非選擇題 ( 第 I 題,每格 2 分,共 4 分;第 II 題 6 分;第 III 題 6 分;共 16 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲請依據中文提示,將試題內空格  、  答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ),分別作答於答 案卷之作答欄  、  之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲請勿抄題,每格限填一字,超過一字者視為錯誤,不予計分。
